name: setup button starts the onboarding flow

payload.text:
⚙️ Let's set up your reminder bot.

First, I need the Telegram channel where reminders will be posted.

Please send me the channel's username (e.g. @mychannel) or its numeric ID (e.g. -1001234567890).

Note: You must add this bot as an administrator in the channel with posting permissions.
That doesn't look like a valid channel. Use a @username or numeric ID (e.g. -1001234567890).
